CREATE TABLE test_strings (id Int32, utf16le_string String, AS convertCharset(utf16le_string, 'utf16le'));
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, 'example'), (3, 'こんにちは');
SELECT id, javaHashUTF16LE(convertCharset(utf16le_string, 'utf-8', 'utf-16le')) AS hash_value FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, javaHashUTF16LE(utf16le_string) FROM test_strings WHERE utf16le_string LIKE 'ex%';
WITH (SELECT utf16le_string FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2) AS subquery SELECT javaHashUTF16LE(subquery) AS hash_value;
CREATE TABLE another_table (other_id Int32, foreign_string String);
INSERT INTO another_table VALUES (1, 'foreign string'), (2, 'another foreign string');
SELECT t1.id, javaHashUTF16LE(t1.utf16le_string) AS hash_value, t2.other_id FROM test_strings t1 INNER JOIN another_table t2 ON t1.id = t2.other_id;
SELECT id, javaHashUTF16LE(concat(utf16le_string, ' concatenated')) FROM test_strings;
SELECT javaHashUTF16LE(convertCharset(utf16le_string, 'utf-8', 'utf-16le')) AS hash_value FROM test_strings WHERE utf16le_string IS NOT NULL;
